description: Fix Profile Picture Upload — Deploy missing Azure Storage accounts to beta and prod so profile picture uploads work end-to-end

userStories.title: Deploy storage infrastructure to beta
userStories.description: As a developer, I want the beta storage account (burnbuddybetasa) created with proper RBAC so that profile picture uploads work on the beta environment.
acceptanceCriteria: Run `az deployment group create --what-if` on buddyburn-beta — confirm only the storage account, container, and role assignment are new resources
Deploy: `az deployment group create --resource-group buddyburn-beta --template-file infra/main.bicep --parameters infra/main.beta.bicepparam`
Verify storage account exists: `az storage account show -n burnbuddybetasa -g buddyburn-beta`
Verify `uploads` container exists: `az storage container list --account-name burnbuddybetasa --auth-mode login`
Verify RBAC role Storage Blob Data Contributor assigned to beta API identity 71e4c958-eb58-4611-9c2f-6cb7d10502e6
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Storage account burnbuddybetasa already deployed with uploads container and RBAC for API identity 71e4c958-eb58-4611-9c2f-6cb7d10502e6. Verified via az CLI.

userStories.title: Verify upload on beta
userStories.description: As a developer, I want to upload a profile picture on beta and see it succeed so that I have confidence the fix works before deploying to prod.
acceptanceCriteria: Use a test image (JPEG or PNG, under 5 MB) to upload via the beta web app or API
Upload returns 200 with a profilePictureUrl containing a cache-bust query param
The returned URL is accessible and displays the image
The image appears on the account page after refresh
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Upload verified via beta API (curl). HTTP 200 with profilePictureUrl containing ?v= cache-bust. Image URL returns 200 image/webp 256x256. Browser test found pre-existing web app misconfiguration: beta web Docker image has NEXT_PUBLIC_API_URL baked to prod API at build time, causing uploads to hit prod API (503). This is a deployment/build pipeline issue, not a storage infrastructure issue.

userStories.title: Deploy storage infrastructure to prod
userStories.description: As a developer, I want the prod storage account (burnbuddyprodsa) created with proper RBAC so that profile picture uploads work on production.
acceptanceCriteria: Run `az deployment group create --what-if` on buddyburn-prod — confirm only the storage account, container, and role assignment are new resources
Deploy: `az deployment group create --resource-group buddyburn-prod --template-file infra/main.bicep --parameters infra/main.prod.bicepparam`
Verify storage account exists: `az storage account show -n burnbuddyprodsa -g buddyburn-prod`
Verify `uploads` container exists
Verify RBAC role Storage Blob Data Contributor assigned to prod API identity 98741ca4-30cd-4148-8995-52deab36564f
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Verify upload on prod
userStories.description: As a developer, I want to upload a profile picture on production and see it succeed so that the user-facing bug is resolved.
acceptanceCriteria: Upload a test image via production web app or API
Upload returns 200 with valid profilePictureUrl
The returned URL is accessible
Error message 'Storage service unavailable' no longer appears
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Add test fixture image to repo
userStories.description: As a developer, I want a committed test image in the repo so that E2E and manual tests for profile picture upload are reproducible.
acceptanceCriteria: Small JPEG image committed at tests/fixtures/test-avatar.jpg (under 100 KB)
Image is a valid JPEG that passes the API's MIME type validation
Documented in the PRD as the standard test asset for upload flows
Typecheck passes
